tei:classSpec.tei:desc: This attribute class provides the attribute note.order.

tei:attDef.tei:desc: This attribute defines the order of notes. It can take the values "ascending pitch", "descending pitch" or a list of ids specifying the exact order of notes with possibility to have chords (e.g. [#id1 #id2]) and repetitions (e.g. |: #id1 #id2 :|).

schematron:assert.test: . eq 'descending pitch' or . eq 'ascending pitch' or (every $i in tokenize(., '\s+') satisfies (starts-with($i, '#') or $i = ('[', ']', '|', '|:', ':|', ':|:')))

schematron:rule.schematron:assert: The value of @note.order should either be 'ascending pitch', 'descending pitch' or a list of references (each starting with '#') optionally combined with grouping tokens ('[', ']', '|') and repetition tokens ('|:', ':|', ':|:').
